name: Slow Cooker Red Beans & Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 pound DRIED SMALL RED CHILI BEANS
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine the beans with enough cold water to cover by 2 inches.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat and boil for 2 minutes. Remove from heat, cover the pot, and let stand for 1 hour (beans can also be soaked overnight).
3. Drain well. Transfer to slow cooker.
4. Stir in the drained beans, water, beef broth, and red pepper.
5. Bury the ham hock in the bean mixture. Cover and slow-cook until the beans are very tender, 9 to 10 hours on low.
6. Remove the ham hock. Remove meat and discard the rest. Return meat to pot, and stir in salt.
7. Serve beans in bowls, spooned over hot cooked rice, and sprinkled with chopped green onions.
